title: Implement idle model unloading
description: Implement the designed idle unloading mechanism, ensuring proper cleanup and thread safety

title: Investigate and implement model idle unloading in volsung TTS server
description: Analyze volsung's current model loading behavior and implement automatic model unloading after 5 minutes of idle time to optimize memory usage

title: Discover and inventory model loading code
description: Find all files related to model loading, management, and memory handling in the volsung codebase

title: Analyze current model loading behavior
description: Examine the discovered code to determine if models are swapped or loaded permanently, identify memory management patterns

title: Design idle unloading mechanism
description: Design an idle timeout system (5 minutes) for model unloading, considering thread safety and TTS request handling

title: Research and integrate music/SFX generation into volsung
description: Research and evaluate AI models for music generation and sound effects (SFX) to extend volsung's capabilities for audiobook production. Identify suitable models, their APIs, resource requirements, and integration strategies.

title: Research music generation models
description: Research state-of-the-art AI models for music generation (e.g., MusicGen, AudioLDM, Stable Audio, MusicLM). Evaluate their capabilities, resource requirements, licensing, and APIs.

title: Research sound effects (SFX) generation models
description: Research AI models for sound effects generation (e.g., AudioLDM-SFX, Soundify, specialized SFX models). Evaluate their capabilities, resource requirements, licensing, and APIs.

title: Design integration architecture
description: Based on research findings, design integration architecture for adding music and SFX capabilities to volsung. Include model selection, API design, resource management, and memory considerations.

title: Implement music generation endpoint
description: Create proof-of-concept implementation integrating the top 1-2 music generation models into volsung with new API endpoints.

title: Implement SFX generation endpoint
description: Create proof-of-concept implementation integrating the top 1-2 SFX generation models into volsung with new API endpoints.

title: Setup volsung project structure for Music/SFX modules
description: Set up the project directory structure for volsung Music and SFX modules based on the ARCHITECTURE.md design. Create all directories, __init__.py files, and base class skeletons following the modular architecture.

title: Create base model classes
description: Create base abstract classes in volsung/models/: base.py with ModelManagerBase, GeneratorBase; types.py with AudioResult; registry.py with ModelRegistry

title: Create configuration module
description: Create configuration management: volsung/config.py with VolsungConfig, environment variable support, and YAML loading

title: Create TTS module structure
description: Create volsung/tts/ module structure with manager.py, endpoints.py, schemas.py following the existing server.py logic but refactored into the new structure

title: Create Music module skeleton
description: Create volsung/music/ module with manager.py, endpoints.py, schemas.py, and generators/musicgen.py with MusicGen integration placeholder

title: Create SFX module skeleton
description: Create volsung/sfx/ module with manager.py, endpoints.py, schemas.py, and generators/audioldm.py with AudioLDM integration placeholder

title: Create audio utilities module
description: Create volsung/audio/ module with utils.py (base64 conversion) and effects.py (audio processing utilities)

title: Create Stitcher module skeleton
description: Create volsung/stitcher/ module with composer.py, schemas.py, endpoints.py as placeholder for future audio composition

title: Update pyproject.toml dependencies
description: Add new dependencies to pyproject.toml: diffusers>=0.29.0, audiocraft>=1.3.0, accelerate>=0.30.0

title: Create directory structure
description: Create directory structure: volsung/models/, volsung/tts/, volsung/music/, volsung/sfx/, volsung/audio/, volsung/stitcher/ with proper __init__.py files

title: Finalize project: tests, docs, commit and push
description: Final project setup: Build tests for all modules, update main server.py to register routers and update docs endpoint, then commit and push all changes.

title: Build tests for all modules
description: Create comprehensive tests for all modules: base classes (ModelManagerBase, GeneratorBase), TTS module, Music module, SFX module, audio utilities, and stitcher. Use pytest with fixtures and mocks.

title: Update server.py and docs endpoint
description: Update volsung/server.py to register all module routers (TTS, Music, SFX, Stitcher), update the /doc endpoint with new API documentation, and ensure proper imports.

title: Commit and push all changes
description: Commit all changes with descriptive messages and push to git repository.

title: Verify all tests pass
description: Run all tests to verify everything works, check Python syntax, verify imports resolve correctly.

title: Remove stitcher feature from project
description: Remove the stitcher feature from the volsung project. Delete the stitcher directory and remove all references to it from other files like server.py, tests, and any imports.

title: Delete stitcher directory
description: Delete volsung/stitcher/ directory and all its contents (composer.py, schemas.py, endpoints.py, __init__.py)

title: Remove stitcher from server.py
description: Remove stitcher_router import and registration from volsung/server.py. Remove stitcher from health endpoint and docs endpoint.

title: Delete stitcher tests
description: Delete tests/test_stitcher.py file

title: Commit removal of stitcher
description: Commit all changes with message about removing stitcher feature

title: Remove stitcher imports
description: Remove stitcher imports from volsung/__init__.py and any other files that import from stitcher module

title: Research TTS alternatives with better emotion and inflection
description: Research alternative TTS models that support voice cloning with better emotional expression and inflection control than current Qwen3-TTS implementation. No code changes needed - just research and recommendations.

title: Research TTS voice cloning alternatives
description: Research current state-of-the-art TTS models that support voice cloning and emotional expression. Focus on models that might have better inflection than Qwen3-TTS. Look at: ElevenLabs, Coqui TTS, Bark, StyleTTS 2, XTTS v2, etc.

title: Research StyleTTS and XTTS emotion control and multi-model integration
description: Deep dive into StyleTTS 2 and XTTS v2 emotion control mechanisms, and research technical feasibility of running multiple TTS models (Qwen + StyleTTS/XTTS) in the same volsung application with load/unload patterns.

title: Research emotion control mechanisms
description: Research StyleTTS 2 emotion control: how style vectors work, what emotions are supported, how to control intensity, API for emotion control. Also check XTTS v2 emotion/style transfer capabilities and how they compare.

title: Research multi-model integration feasibility
description: Research technical requirements for running Qwen3-TTS + StyleTTS 2 + XTTS v2 in same application. Check VRAM requirements, model loading patterns, whether they can coexist or need exclusive loading.

title: Implement StyleTTS 2 alongside Qwen3-TTS in volsung
description: Add StyleTTS 2 as an alternative TTS backend to volsung, allowing users to choose between Qwen3-TTS and StyleTTS 2. Implement voice cloning with controllable emotion via text content and embedding_scale parameter.

title: Create StyleTTS 2 generator
description: Create StyleTTS 2 generator in volsung/tts/generators/styletts2.py extending GeneratorBase. Implement load(), unload(), generate() methods with style vector extraction and emotion control via embedding_scale.

title: Create StyleTTS 2 manager
description: Create StyleTTS 2 manager in volsung/tts/managers/styletts2.py extending TTSModelManager. Handle model loading, style computation, and inference with emotion parameters.

title: Update dependencies for StyleTTS 2
description: Add styletts2 dependencies to pyproject.toml (styletts2 package, phonemizer, espeak-ng). Update existing dependencies if needed.

title: Create tests for StyleTTS 2
description: Create tests for StyleTTS 2 integration: test generator, test manager, test emotion parameters, test voice cloning workflow.

title: Update TTS endpoints for StyleTTS 2
description: Update TTS module endpoints to support StyleTTS 2 backend. Add backend parameter to voice design endpoint, update schemas for StyleTTS-specific parameters (embedding_scale, alpha, beta).

title: Implement comprehensive model preloading with GPU memory management
description: Audit all models (Qwen3-TTS, StyleTTS 2, MusicGen, AudioLDM) and implement unified preload system that unloads existing models before loading new ones to conserve GPU memory. Update /preload endpoint to support all models with selective loading options.

title: Audit all model preload capabilities
description: Audit all model managers and identify current preload capabilities. Check: Qwen3-TTS (server.py), StyleTTS 2 (tts/managers/styletts2.py), MusicGen (music/manager.py), AudioLDM (sfx/manager.py). Document which support preload and how they handle GPU memory.

title: Create unified preload system
description: Create unified ModelRegistry.preload() method that accepts model names and handles loading/unloading logic. Implement automatic unloading of existing models before loading new ones to conserve GPU memory.

title: Update documentation
description: Update API documentation for /preload endpoint explaining model selection, GPU memory management, and usage examples.

title: Update preload endpoint
description: Update /preload endpoint to support selective model loading with 'models' parameter accepting list of model names. Default behavior: unload all existing, then load requested models. Support 'all' option.
